_what_this_is: Content request: suggested workout programs behind Train's program chips (PPL, Upper/Lower, Bro, Full Body). Each program offers one or more variants by training days per week; selecting a program shows its weekly schedule and lets the user adopt it as their plan.
_how_to_fill: For each program, provide at least one variant. A variant = a specific days-per-week layout (e.g. PPL as a 6-day and a 5-day variant).
recommendedDaysPerWeek: which weekly frequencies this program suits — used to recommend a program from the user's onboarding answer (e.g. Upper/Lower suits 4, PPL suits 5-6).
Each day: a name and an ordered exercise list. exerciseId MUST be an id from content/muscle-involvement_filled.json (the 189-exercise catalog).
sets: number of sets. reps: target reps per set (one number; if you want pyramid sets like 12/10/8, use repsPerSet as an array instead of reps). restSeconds: rest between sets.
Optional per day: focus (one line shown under the day name, e.g. 'Chest, shoulders, triceps').
Optional per variant: notes (one or two lines of coaching guidance shown with the schedule).
Fill the four presets. The 'Coach' program is generated in-app and needs no content.
